warm-dark.usage: Borders, grid lines, shadow color base. Never used for text.

warm-darker.usage: Emphasis borders, sticker shadows, interactive outlines.

surface-pale.usage: Pill backgrounds, icon wells, progress tracks, FAQ items, side-tab panels.

display.purpose: Hero brand statements only. Never outside the first viewport.

panel.purpose: Inside service panels and showcase moments.

title.purpose: Compact titles on process cards, work meta, pricing names.

label.purpose: Kickers, stickers, badges, nav dots, section markers.

shadows.name: sticker-shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Small decorative elements: nav dots, badges, small stickers.

shadows.name: sticker-shadow-md
shadows.purpose: Default decorative shadow for buttons and pills.

shadows.name: sticker-shadow-2xl
shadows.purpose: Testimonial cards and service stack panel.

shadows.name: ambient-lift
shadows.purpose: Soft blurred shadow for hover states on interactive elements.

shadows.name: deep-stack
shadows.purpose: Combined ambient and sticker shadow for thick substantial objects.

components.name: Primary CTA
components.description: The main call to action. Pill-shaped, orange, sticker shadow.
components.css: .primaryAction { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 48px; padding: 0 20px; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(56% 0.20 45); color: oklch(98% 0.01 45); font-size: 0.86rem; font-weight: 600; border: 1px solid oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.16); box-shadow: 5px 5px 0 oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.12); transition: transform 220ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.38, 1), background-color 220ms; } .primaryAction:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: oklch(52% 0.18 45); } .primaryAction:active { translate: 0 1px; scale: 0.985; }

components.name: Process Card
components.description: Stacked card for multi-step process. Scroll-driven stack-to-spread choreography.
components.html:
Discovery

A 30-min call to understand your business goals.
components.css: .processCard { width: min(82%, 720px); min-height: 260px; border: 2px solid oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.14); border-radius: 8px; background: oklch(98% 0.028 94); box-shadow: 12px 12px 0 oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.16); } .processCard:nth-child(even) { background: oklch(95% 0.08 210); } .processCard:nth-child(3) { background: oklch(96% 0.07 350); } .processCard:nth-child(4) { background: oklch(94% 0.08 88); }

components.name: Testimonial Card
components.description: Stacked proof card with scroll-driven deck choreography.
components.html:
01

Akhil Lodha

Made the offer easier to choose

They dug into what clients ask before they call.

Financial advisor
Prooffirst
components.css: .testimonialCard { border: 2px solid oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.14); border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 14px 14px 0 oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.14); } .testimonialCard.testimonialWarm { background: oklch(98% 0.028 94); } .testimonialCard.testimonialRose { background: oklch(96% 0.06 350); } .testimonialCard.testimonialMint { background: oklch(96% 0.055 210); }

components.name: Pricing Card
components.description: Pinned-proposal pricing card with slight rotation and decorative circle.
components.html:
Most Popular

Growth

₹85,000

For established businesses.

  • Custom design
  • Launch support
Get Started
components.css: .pricingCard { border: 2px solid oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.12); border-radius: 8px; background: oklch(99% 0.012 75); box-shadow: 12px 12px 0 oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.14); } .featuredPricing { background: oklch(56% 0.20 45); color: oklch(98% 0.01 45); } .pricingBadge { background: oklch(90% 0.12 88); border-radius: 9999px; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.13); transform: rotate(-3deg); }

components.name: FAQ Accordion
components.description: Details-based accordion with sticker shadow and orange border on open.
components.html:
How long does a build take?

Most market-fit sites ship within 3-4 weeks.
components.css: .faqList details { border: 2px solid oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.1); border-radius: 8px; background: oklch(99% 0.01 70); box-shadow: 6px 6px 0 oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.08); } .faqList details[open] { border-color: oklch(56% 0.20 45); box-shadow: 9px 9px 0 oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.1); }

components.name: Copy Email Button
components.description: Pill-shaped clipboard button with state feedback (idle, copying, copied, failed).
components.css: .copyEmailButton { min-height: 42px; padding: 0 18px; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(99% 0.01 70 / 0.9); color: oklch(15% 0.018 45); font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 800; border: 1px solid oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.15); box-shadow: 4px 5px 0 oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.1); } .copyEmailButton[data-copy-state="copied"] { background: oklch(82% 0.18 132); } .copyEmailButton[data-copy-state="failed"] { background: oklch(76% 0.16 350); }

components.name: Launch Map
components.description: Desktop-only fixed route tracker at page bottom. Five stops with progress rail.
components.html:
RouteYour website story
  1. 01AboutWho for
components.css: .launchMap { border: 2px solid oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.14); border-radius: 12px; background: repeating-linear-gradient(-6deg, oklch(99% 0.012 76) 0 11px, oklch(96% 0.035 88) 11px 12px); box-shadow: 0 16px 34px oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.13), 9px 9px 0 oklch(20% 0.02 45 / 0.12); transform: translateX(-50%) rotate(-0.7deg); }

narrative.overview: Nexora Labs should feel like a small expert team that turns real-world trust into a clear digital buyer path. The system is warm, tactile, clear, custom, and more visibly playful than a typical agency site. It should feel like a studio table covered with useful tools, marked-up proofs, launch notes, and confident little stickers.
keyCharacteristics: Warm and inviting palette with committed orange
Punchy and playful accent colors as spatial actors
Tactile hierarchy via solid offset shadows and stacked objects
Typographic authority with bold geometric sans
Studio-table layout rhythm, not generic section stacking

rules.name: The 10% Pop Rule
rules.body: The primary orange is a high-chroma tool meant for impact. Use it on no more than 10% of the interface surface.

rules.name: The Flat-at-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are clean and flat by default. Shadows appear only as a response to state or as a deliberate sticker-shadow decorative choice.

rules.name: The No-Tracking Rule
rules.body: Letter spacing remains 0 for all headings and body text. Tracking is reserved exclusively for short uppercase labels.

rules.name: The Sticker-Shadow Only Rule
rules.body: The only decorative shadow vocabulary is the hard-edged offset shadow (no blur). Blurred shadows are reserved for ambient lift on interactive hover states.

dos: Do use OKLCH for all color declarations.
Do keep the palette warm, tinted, and brand-specific. Every neutral is hue-shifted toward 45.
Do make orange a committed brand signal, not a tiny accent.
Do use large type with real confidence. The display clamp reaches 8.2rem.
Do use the sticker-shadow pattern (solid offset, no blur) for decorative depth.
Do wrap body text at 65ch for legibility.
Do preserve reduced-motion support for all scroll choreography and entrance animations.
donts: Don't use pure #000 or #fff. Every neutral is tinted toward the brand hue.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient).
Don't use decorative glassmorphism (blurs and glass cards as default).
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent).
Don't repeat identical icon-card grids as the main structure.
Don't make the site look like a generic SaaS landing page.
Don't use standard SaaS blue or cold greys.
